intro: Dev-call intelligence - the running capture of what our daily calls cover (in-product, carriers/vendors, data & servicing), the goals we're driving, the blockers in the way, and items that still need a task. Auto-summarized from the Gemini call recap.
note: Populated by CIH from the Gemini dev-call recap email after each call. (The site is static - the on-page button loads the last CIH-published notes; CIH regenerates this from the newest Gemini email.)
goals: Guarantee agent-data capture - make the agent number a required field at registration in ILIA and back-fill existing agents by querying the database on policy number.
Close the missing-statement gaps - batch the flagged policy-years to National Life for correction and fix the confirmation-statement date logic.
Finish ePay transaction-number integrity - verify the deployed fix for new payments and resolve recurring/monthly ePay handling with the ePay team.
Unblock DBR - load master-settlor data (settlor is not the insured) and reprocess Tron 66+ so illustrated surrender values recalculate.
Smooth signing - drop internally-managed required fields from the DocuSign templates and finalize the 2nd-envelope index-allocation acknowledgement form.

blockers.title: Recurring/monthly ePay payments still missing transaction numbers
blockers.ask: Fix is live for new transactions; work out with the ePay team how scheduled/recurring payments capture transaction numbers (Judy to ePay team; Mohit verifying).

blockers.title: DBR reprocessing blocked on master-settlor data load
blockers.ask: Prioritize the settlor-data information load so DBR can reprocess; reprocess Tron 66+ for illustrated surrender values (Mohit / Shounak).

blockers.title: Scraper throughput - National Life site latency stalling jobs (24h+)
blockers.ask: Separate carrier-side gaps from scraper logic; compile the failing policies and test the date-logic adjustment (Shounak / Mohit).

blockers.title: Linking writing agent (NPN) to an existing agent account is a significant lift
blockers.ask: Chris to confirm priority; decide whether to invest in linking NPN from policy feeds to agent accounts.

needs_tasked.t: Make agent number a required field at registration in ILIA (new agents)
Investigate effort to extract existing agent numbers from database feeds; back-fill by querying on policy number
Confirmation-statement date-logic fix - statements landing before the crediting date or on the same date as the annual statement

latest_call.title: Dev Meeting
latest_call.lede: Data-integration + servicing workflow call. Headlines: the team will make the agent number a required registration field (and back-fill existing agents from the database); missing annual/confirmation statements shift to a batch fix with National Life instead of case-by-case troubleshooting; the ePay transaction-number fix is live for new payments with recurring payments still to resolve; and DocuSign templates will drop internally-managed required fields so clients can go straight to signing.

items.text: Agent number will be set to required at registration in ILIA so agent data is captured for every new agent (supports Salesforce recruitment).
DocuSign templates: remove required financial fields that should already carry over from ILIA, so clients only need to sign.
Back-fill existing agent numbers by querying the database on policy number, then match/update agent records (Kyle to scope the lift, Mohit to pull).
Allianz/National Life index-allocation acknowledgement form confirmed for the second signing envelope; data labels being cleaned/mapped on staging.
Disconnected policies on National Life's side to be reported to the carrier for correction (Judy).
Batch list of missing annual/confirmation statements to be sent to National Life rather than troubleshooting each case manually (Shounak / Judy).
~933 policy-years flagged with missing annual/confirmation-statement data; separating scraper failures from carrier-side gaps.
Confirmation-statement date-logic discrepancies (statements before the crediting date, or same date as the annual statement) - date-logic fix being tested.
Scraper running slow (National Life site latency, some jobs 24h+); scraper logic unchanged, so gaps look carrier-side.
ePay: servicing payments were missing transaction numbers - fix deployed for new transactions; recurring/monthly ePay handling still to resolve with the ePay team.
DBR reprocessing: prioritize the master-settlor data load and reprocess Tron 66+ to recalculate illustrated surrender values.
Agent number to become a required field at registration in ILIA.
DocuSign templates to drop internally-managed required fields; clients go straight to signing.
Allianz index-allocation acknowledgement form adopted for the second envelope.
Missing statements to be handled by batch resolution with National Life (stop case-by-case).
Agent data to be retrieved by querying the database on policy number; continue scraping the pending policy list.

themes.name: Agent Data & Registration
themes.latest: Agent number to become a required field at registration; existing agent numbers to be back-filled by querying the DB on policy number. NPN-to-account linking flagged as a larger lift.

themes.name: Missing Statements & Scraper Data Gaps
themes.latest: ~933 policy-years with missing annual/confirmation statements; shifting to a batch request to National Life. Date-logic fix being tested for statements landing before the crediting date.

themes.name: DBR / Master-Settlor Data Load
themes.latest: Prioritizing the master-settlor data information load (settlor is not the insured) and Tron 66+ reprocess so DBR calculations and illustrated surrender values can run.

themes.name: ePay Data Integrity
themes.latest: Transaction-number fix deployed for new servicing payments; recurring/monthly ePay payments still need transaction numbers - to be worked out with the ePay team.

themes.name: DocuSign Signing Friction
themes.latest: Templates were forcing clients to fill financial fields that should transfer from ILIA; removing the 'required' status so clients can sign directly.

themes.name: Allocation Forms (2nd Envelope)
themes.latest: Index-allocation acknowledgement form adopted for the second envelope (Allianz); data labels being mapped/cleaned on staging for National Life and Allianz.

themes.name: GWT - Agent-Driven Enrollment
themes.latest: Decision to simplify GWT to an agent-driven invitation flow; Jamin building diagrams/mockups. No update this call.

themes.name: Surrender Workflow
themes.latest: Improved logging + auto admin email notifications on status = surrendered. No update this call.

urgent.title: Recurring/monthly ePay payments missing transaction numbers
~933 policy-years missing statements - batch to National Life
DBR reprocess blocked on master-settlor data load

dev_tagged.text: Annual review / scraper data gaps - compile failing policies + test confirmation-statement date-logic fix.
Master-settlor data load (settlor is not the insured) - DBR blocker; then reprocess Tron 66+.
ePay receipt transaction-number fix - verify new payments; extend to recurring/monthly.
Mapping allocations for National Life - clean data labels on the 2nd-envelope crediting form.
Pre-fill DocuSign with ILIA data - drop internally-managed required fields.
